chains.label: AI Power Grid Buildout
chains.explainer: Hyperscaler datacentre demand pushing utilities + power-hardware names. NVDA earnings on May 8 confirmed datacentre revenue +85% YoY — the picks-and-shovels names supplying power, cooling, and grid capacity benefit on a 2-3 quarter lag.

tickers.name: NVIDIA
tickers.rationale: Named in 12 of 14 source headlines; earnings beat on datacentre

tickers.name: AMD
tickers.rationale: Named in 5 of 14 headlines; MI300 ramp

tickers.name: Vertiv
tickers.rationale: Liquid-cooling supplier to NVDA — quietly up 6% on the news

tickers.name: Eaton
tickers.rationale: Datacentre power systems; quiet earnings beat May 5

tickers.name: Vistra
tickers.rationale: Datacentre power purchase agreements; biggest Layer-3 mover

chains.label: GLP-1 Pipeline Expansion
chains.explainer: Eli Lilly's Mounjaro maintenance dose study at AHA conference moved sentiment. Adjacent diagnostics, manufacturing, and even consumer-discretionary names (food brands cutting portion sizes) feel the second-order impact.

tickers.name: West Pharma
tickers.rationale: Injection device supplier to LLY + NVO

chains.label: China Rare-Earth Export Curbs
chains.explainer: China announced new export licensing on rare-earth refining outputs. US/AU producers + Western magnet manufacturers see policy tailwind. Defence supply chain particularly exposed.

tickers.name: RTX
tickers.rationale: Same exposure across Patriot + Tomahawk programs
